mnemonic: pretty [при'тъи] хорошенький -(Приди) ко мне хорошенькая девочка.

pretty ['prɪtɪ]
***
МИЛОМУ дверь отоприте. (это) pretty
ДОВОЛЬНО, дверь отоприте! (это) pretty

examples.eng: She was driving pretty fast.
The tune is pretty.
What a pretty little garden!
I have to leave pretty soon.
I'm pretty sure he'll say yes.
examples.ru: Я вполне уверена, что он скажет "да".

examples.eng: The work is pretty hard.
She still looks pretty miserable.
I see them pretty regularly.
She is pretty, bubbly, and smart.
Dinner at Luigi's sounds pretty good to me.
examples.ru: Ужин у Луиджи — звучит довольно неплохо.

examples.eng: He is a pretty awful driver.
I feel pretty sick about it.
Elsie's still prettying herself.
The music was pretty spooky.
He made a pretty profit selling his antique car.
examples.ru: Он заработал хорошую прибыль, продав свой ретро-автомобиль.

examples.eng: Maria looks much prettier with her hair cut short.
examples.ru: Мария выглядит намного привлекательнее с короткой стрижкой.

examples.eng: It was pretty tough on her.
Their rates are pretty steep.
It sounded pretty dull to me.
examples.ru: Это звучало довольно скучно / глупо для меня.

examples.eng: The weather forecast is pretty grim.
She was feeling pretty tense.
Mother brought a pretty Poll.
She's a pretty cool customer.
The ending was pretty obvious.
That's a pretty hat you are wearing.
She's pretty cool.
examples.ru: Она очень классная. / Она довольно крутая.

examples.eng: She got into a pretty tear.
She is pretty fleet of foot.
She's pretty, but lacks poise.
examples.ru: Она красива, но ей не хватает самообладания.

examples.eng: They lead a pretty mundane life.
